name: teams-service-interface
description: Create ITeamsService interface and domain types for teams feature
acceptanceCriteria: types.ts has NO runtime imports (pure TypeScript types only)
Role enum defines owner=4, admin=3, member=2, viewer=1 with numeric values for comparison
Organization type has: id, name, slug, ownerId, settings, createdAt, updatedAt
Team type has: id, name, description, organizationId, parentTeamId (optional), createdAt
App type has: id, name, slug, teamId, settings, createdAt, updatedAt
Membership type has: id, userId, organizationId?, teamId?, appId?, role, createdAt (exactly one of org/team/app set)
Invitation type has: id, email, inviterId, organizationId?, teamId?, role, expiresAt, status, createdAt
ITeamsService interface defines: createOrganization, getOrganization, updateOrganization, deleteOrganization
ITeamsService interface defines: createTeam, getTeam, updateTeam, deleteTeam, getTeamsForOrg
ITeamsService interface defines: createApp, getApp, updateApp, deleteApp, getAppsForTeam
ITeamsService interface defines: addMembership, removeMembership, getMembershipsForUser, getMembershipsForResource
ITeamsService interface defines: createInvitation, acceptInvitation, declineInvitation, getInvitationsForResource
